mapper.select:
SELECT T1.ID, T1.WORK_PLAN_ID, T1.DISPATCH_TYPE, T1.WORK_POSITION_CODE, T1.WORK_POSITION_NAME, T1.EQUIPMENT_TYPE_ID, T1.EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME, T1.EQUIPMENT_ID, T1.EQUIPMENT_NO, T1.OPERATORS_ID, T1.OPERATORS_NAME, T1.DEPT_ID, T1.DEPT_NAME, T1.REMARK, T1.CREATE_BY, T1.CREATE_BY_NAME, T1.CREATE_TIME, T1._BY, T1.UPDATE_BY_NAME, T1.UPDATE_TIME, T1.SUB_PROCESS_CODE, T1.SUB_PROCESS_NAME FROM T_PRD_DISPATCH_SECONDARY T1
id = #{id}

SELECT DS.ID, DS.DEPT_ID, DS.COMPANY_ID, DS.COMPANY_NAME, DS.WORK_POSITION_CODE, DS.WORK_POSITION_NAME, DS.WORK_PLAN_ID, DS.NUMBER_COUNT, DS.SUB_PROCESS_CODE, DS.SUB_PROCESS_NAME, DS.DEPT_PARENT_ID, DS.DEPT_PARENT_NAME FROM T_PRD_DISPATCH_SECONDARY DS WHERE DS.DISPATCH_TYPE = '2' AND DS.WORK_PLAN_ID = #{workPlanId}

SELECT t.id AS companyId, t.DEPT_NAME AS companyName, t1.id AS deptId, t1.DEPT_NAME AS deptName FROM SYS_DEPT t LEFT JOIN SYS_DEPT t1 ON t1.PARENT_ID = t.id AND t.DEPT_LEVEL = 1 WHERE (t1.DEPT_LEVEL = 3 OR t1.DEPT_LEVEL = 4) AND t.STATUS = '1' AND t1.STATUS = '1' AND t.IN_OUT_TYPE = 'O'

SELECT t.id AS companyId, t.DEPT_NAME AS companyName, t2.id AS deptId, t2.DEPT_NAME AS deptName FROM SYS_DEPT t2 LEFT JOIN SYS_DEPT t1 ON t2.PARENT_ID = t1.id AND t1.DEPT_LEVEL = 2 LEFT JOIN SYS_DEPT t ON t1.PARENT_ID = t.id AND t.DEPT_LEVEL = 1 WHERE (t2.DEPT_LEVEL = 3 OR t2.DEPT_LEVEL = 4) AND t.STATUS = '1' AND t1.STATUS = '1' AND t2.STATUS = '1' AND t.IN_OUT_TYPE = 'O'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_PRD_DISPATCH_SECONDARY( ID, WORK_PLAN_ID, DISPATCH_TYPE, WORK_POSITION_CODE, WORK_POSITION_NAME, EQUIPMENT_TYPE_ID, EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME, EQUIPMENT_ID, EQUIPMENT_NO, OPERATORS_ID, OPERATORS_NAME, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workPlanId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dispatchType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workPositionCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workPositionName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{equipmentTypeId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{equipmentTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{equipmentId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{equipmentNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operatorsId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operatorsName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_PRD_DISPATCH_SECONDARY SET ID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WORK_PLAN_ID = #{workPlanId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DISPATCH_TYPE = #{dispatchType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WORK_POSITION_CODE = #{workPositionCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WORK_POSITION_NAME = #{workPositionName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EQUIPMENT_TYPE_ID = #{equipmentTypeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME = #{equipmentTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EQUIPMENT_ID = #{equipmentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EQUIPMENT_NO = #{equipmentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NUM = #{num,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPERATORS_ID = #{operatorsId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPERATORS_NAME = #{operatorsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEPT_ID = #{deptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEPT_NAME = #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COMPANY_ID = #{item.companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, COMPANY_NAME = #{item.companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}, SUB_PROCESS_CODE = #{subProcessCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SUB_PROCESS_NAME = #{subProcessName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM T_PRD_DISPATCH_SECONDARY WHERE "ID" IN ( SELECT T1. ID FROM T_PRD_DISPATCH_SECONDARY T1 WHERE T1.WORK_PLAN_ID = #{workPlanId} AND T1.DISPATCH_TYPE = #{dispatchType} )
mapper.select: SELECT ID AS "id", DEPT_NAME AS "deptName", DEPT_LEVEL AS "deptLevel" FROM SYS_DEPT START WITH ID = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT} CONNECT BY PRIOR PARENT_ID=ID

select TPWTD.id "ticketDetailId", decode(TPWTD.ALLOT_TYPE,'2','机械分配','3','人员分配') "allotType", TBT.TRUST_NO "trustNo" from T_PRD_WORK_TICKET TPWT left join T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_DETAIL TPWTD on TPWT.id = TPWTD.WORK_TICKET_ID left join T_PRD_WORK_PLAN TPWP on TPWP.id = TPWT.WORK_PLAN_ID left join T_BUS_TRUST TBT on TBT.id = TPWP.TRUST_ID where TPWT.WORK_PLAN_ID = #{workPlanId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and TPWTD.id is not null and TPWTD.ALLOT_TYPE in (2,3)
SELECT t2.id AS deptParentId, t2.DEPT_NAME AS deptParentName FROM SYS_DEPT t2 WHERE t2.DEPT_LEVEL = 2 AND t2.STATUS = '1' AND t2.IS_LABOR = 1 ORDER BY t2.DEPT_NAME DESC
SELECT t2.id AS deptId, t2.DEPT_NAME AS deptName FROM SYS_DEPT t2 WHERE t2.STATUS = '1' AND t2.PARENT_ID= #{deptParentId} ORDER BY t2.DEPT_NAME DESC
